visit_summary: Skip this trip - the listing explicitly states key pieces are missing, making it not worth your time.
alignment_summary: The text claims the toy is in 'Good' condition and refers to the photo for reference, but the text also explicitly states that trays and food are missing, contradicting the idea of a complete or good condition set.

reasons.text: Seller explicitly states 'No food or box toys included. No trays that were inside are gone!!'
The listing includes a promotional image that shows a complete set with accessories, which contradicts the seller's statement about missing trays and food.
The actual item photos show the kitchen playset without any of the food or accessories that would typically accompany it.
The seller's tone is dismissive and demanding ('don't ask or will be ignored').
The condition is listed as 'Used - Good' but the explicit mention of missing parts contradicts this.

seller_questions: Can you confirm exactly which pieces are missing besides the trays and food?
Are there any cracks, breaks, or significant damage to the main structure of the kitchen?
Does the microwave or any other part have working lights or sounds?
What is your best offer for the item as-is?
seller_message_draft: Hi, is this still available? Can you confirm exactly which pieces are missing besides the trays and food? Are there any cracks, breaks, or significant damage to the main structure of the kitchen? Does the microwave or any other part have working lights or sounds? What is your best offer for the item as-is?
limitations: Completeness of the set beyond the explicitly mentioned missing trays and food.
Working condition of any electronic or interactive features.
Hidden damage or wear not visible in the provided photos.
The exact condition and cleanliness of the toy.
The final sale price, as it is 'best offer'.
research_recommended: Check for a complete parts list for this specific toy model online.
Search for similar listings to compare completeness and condition.
Look up common issues or recalls for this toy model.
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
